mapper.select: select id, project_id, version_no, baseline_name, description, snapshot_json, status, published_by, published_at from scope_baseline where project_id = #{projectId} order by published_at desc, id desc
select id, project_id, version_no, baseline_name, description, snapshot_json, status, published_by, published_at, created_at from scope_baseline where id = #{id}
